howto_rules: Inherit from CaseOracleXxxBase classes for each phase
Use find_repo_root pattern to locate artifact in workspace
Return RepoRootLocatedCheck when repo is missing
Use DependencyVersionCheck for tool version checks
Use FilesystemPathCheck for build output verification
Use ListSimilarityCheck for numeric result comparison
Support verify/command build modes via environment variable
example_patterns: egwalker common.py: find_repo_root with marker files, RepoRootLocatedCheck, load_json_file
egwalker env_setup.py: DependencyVersionCheck for toolchain, FilesystemPathCheck for refs
egwalker artifact_build.py: verify/command mode split via env var, BuildCommandCheck
egwalker benchmark_prep.py: DatasetManifestCheck against reference JSON
egwalker experiment_runs.py: TimingsJSONSimilarityCheck with Pearson correlation

borrowed_structure.common.py: find_repo_root with Kondo-specific markers (README.md, local-dafny, kondoPrototypes), RepoRootLocatedCheck, load_json_file, load_sloc_csv helper
borrowed_structure.env_setup.py: DependencyVersionCheck for dotnet>=6.0, python3>=3.0; FilesystemPathCheck for key dirs
borrowed_structure.artifact_build.py: verify/command mode pattern from egwalker; checks for local-dafny/Binaries/Dafny.dll
borrowed_structure.benchmark_prep.py: Custom AutogenFilesCheck for verify-all outputs (messageInvariantsAutogen.dfy per protocol)
borrowed_structure.experiment_runs.py: SlocCsvCheck parsing CSV and comparing against reference via Pearson; file existence for proof inspection

artifact_specific_adaptations: Kondo builds a Dafny fork (.NET/C#) rather than Rust/JS tools
Benchmark prep runs verify-all which generates autogen .dfy files via Kondo passes (/msgInvs, /genAsyncProof)
Experiment evaluation produces sloc.csv instead of timings.json
Claims involve SLOC counts (deterministic) rather than performance timings
Two of three experiment claims (invariant counts, final modifications) require manual inspection of .dfy files
build_steps: cd local-dafny && make (runs dotnet build Source/Dafny.sln)
benchmark_assets: 10 protocol directories each with sync/, manual/, async-kondo/ subdirs

reference_templates.sloc.ref.json: Per-protocol manual_proof and sync_proof SLOC counts from paper Table

plan_summary: Kondo oracle verifies: (1) .NET SDK 6.0 and python3 installed, (2) Dafny fork built with Binaries/Dafny.dll, (3) verify-all produced autogenerated .dfy files for all 10 protocols, (4) eval.py produced sloc.csv matching reference SLOC values.

step_coverage.build-001: FilesystemPathCheck for Dafny.dll (verify mode) or BuildCommandCheck (command mode)
step_coverage.build-002: Covered implicitly by Dafny.dll existence check
step_coverage.prep-001: AutogenFilesCheck verifies messageInvariantsAutogen.dfy exists in all 10 protocol async-kondo dirs
step_coverage.run-002: SlocCsvCheck parses sloc.csv and compares against reference via Pearson correlation

step_gaps.run-001: Invariant count verification requires parsing Dafny ProtocolInv predicates and counting clauses; automated only as file-existence checks (optional)
step_gaps.run-003: Final modification line counts require parsing '// modified: N lines' comments in async-kondo/applicationProof.dfy files; not automated

step_augmentations: Added FilesystemPathCheck for local-dafny/ and kondoPrototypes/ directories in env_setup
Added optional FilesystemPathCheck for sync/applicationProof.dfy per protocol as evidence for run-001 invariant inspection
